events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1031. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal, cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Filipino; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: full. 7 meals/week, zone Bayview-Hunters Point.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Lumpiang Sariwa
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Pork Sinigang with Brown Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/550 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/550 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinola with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 412/550 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1031 added to route R-BAYV-1 (Bayview-Hunters Point), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1031: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
